top_signals.title: Modular data center builder Armada raises $230 million, to build Arizona factory with new investor Johnson Controls
top_signals.summary: Modular data center builder Armada has raised $230 million from investors at a valuation of $2 billion, with BlackRock becoming a new investor.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
